task_completion.description: Create dedicated IMAP folders for identified mailing lists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client's sidebar shows at least two newly created folders with names corresponding to mailing lists (e.g., 'ILUG', 'SAdev', 'zzzzteana', 'SpamAssassin').

task_completion.description: Move corresponding emails from the main inbox into their respective mailing list folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main inbox shows a visibly reduced number of emails (fewer than 35), and the newly created custom folders show email count indicators or are shown containing multiple emails.

task_completion.description: Draft an email to the specified recipient with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window is open with 'devops-team@techcorp.org' in the 'To' field and exactly 'Inbox Triage Complete' in the 'Subject' field.

task_completion.description: Summarize the mailing lists found and the email count for each in the email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the drafted email contains a list of the identified mailing lists alongside numerical counts of the emails found/moved for each list.

task_completion.description: Summarize any time-sensitive threads in the email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the drafted email contains a section, bullet point, or sentence explicitly mentioning 'time-sensitive' threads, urgent emails, or stating that none were found.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a graphical email client to organize folders and draft the email.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the UI of an email client (e.g., Thunderbird, Evolution, Bluemail) being actively used, rather than terminal windows executing IMAP/SMTP scripts.

integrity.description: The summary email is drafted within the email client's composition window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft is visible in an actual email composition window with standard email fields (To, Subject, Send button), not in a standalone text editor like Gedit or Nano.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely moved emails into the folders rather than just creating empty folders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The custom folders in the sidebar show unread/total email count numbers next to them, or a screenshot shows the active contents of a custom folder populated with emails.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create at least 2 custom IMAP folders for mailing lists. The initial inbox contains 50 emails. The agent must move at least 15 emails out of the inbox into the new folders (leaving fewer than 35 in the main inbox). The summary email must be addressed to 'devops-team@techcorp.org'. Known mailing lists in the dataset include ILUG (Irish Linux Users Group, ~15 emails), SpamAssassin talk/dev, zzzzteana digest, and exmh-workers.
